name: Slack
description: Sync channels, messages, users, and files from Slack.

install_fields.label: Bot Token
install_fields.description: Slack Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...). From Slack App → OAuth & Permissions.

install_fields.label: Channel Types
install_fields.description: Comma-separated channel types to sync: public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im. Default: public_channel
